rewrite-express-internal-subpath-imports.description: Rewrites `@nx/express/src/*` subpath imports now that the `./src/*` subpath is no longer exposed by `@nx/express`'s exports map. Named imports/exports of public symbols are routed to `@nx/express` and the rest to the new `@nx/express/internal` entry; `require`, dynamic `import` and `jest.mock` calls reference the whole module and are routed to `@nx/express/internal`.
